allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\dev\\Cleavops site" -Force | Where-Object { $_.Name -ne "node_modules" } | Format-Table Name, Attributes -AutoSize)

PowerShell(cd "c:\\dev\\Cleavops site"; $results = @\(\); Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File | Where-Object { $_.Extension -in '.tsx', '.ts', '.mdx', '.md' } | ForEach-Object { $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($_.FullName\); $count = \($content | Select-String -Pattern '—' -AllMatches\).Matches.Count; if \($count -gt 0\) { $results += [PSCustomObject]@{File=$_.FullName; Count=$count} } }; $results | Sort-Object Count -Descending)
